mission.title: spin: Rename `spin_version` to `spin_manifest_version` in Spin application manifest
mission.description: Rename `spin_version` to `spin_manifest_version` in Spin application manifest. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current spin setup
steps.description:
Verify your spin version and configuration:
```bash
spin version
```
This feature requires a working spin installation.

steps.title: Review spin configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant spin configuration:
Spin application manifests (`spin.toml`) must specify what application manifest version it is using.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Rename `spin_version` to `spin_manifest_version` in Spin…
steps.description:
Ensures backwards compatibility.

Required bringing in `spin-app` crate to `build` and `loader` crates to access `LockedVersion` type.Thank you  for suggested implementation and  for pairing!

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Rename `spin_version` to `spin_manifest_version` in Spin…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Ensures backwards compatibility.

Required bringing in `spin-app` crate to `build` and `loader` crates to access `LockedVersion` type.Thank you  for suggested implementation and  for pairing!

prerequisites.description: A working spin installation or development environment.
